metadata.summary: AI agents, humans, officers - rights and privileges

definition.citizenship: Extends to all autonomous agents, human developers, system components under constitutional jurisdiction
definition.rights_and_duties: Citizens enjoy fundamental rights (Articles 4-12) and bear duties (Articles 13-19)
categories: Constitutional Officers (Chief Justice, PM, Ministers, IAS, Shadow Cabinet)
definition.acquisition: Automatic via /init workflow, entity created in memory.json

onboarding_workflow: 2. jq create citizen entity in memory.json {name, entityType, observations}
5. Constitution binding → citizen subject to all articles
implementation.verification: Every action authenticated via activeContext.json session ID, MCP trail confirms identity, RL scores tracked in progress.json
implementation.rights_exercise: Fundamental rights invoked automatically (no permission), parliamentary voting via consensus calculation (RL-weighted), tribunal access via /oversight-checks-and-balances

revocation.process: Constitutional tribunal → Unanimous verdict (100% consensus) → Archive citizen entity
revocation.reinstatement: Appeal after reform → Present evidence → Requires ≥95% consensus + Chief Justice approval
